title: Remote UX Designer Jobs in Canada | Montreal Jobs
description: Find the latest remote UX Designer, Product Designer, and UX Researcher jobs hiring in Canada.

mainEntity.name: What is the average salary for a remote UX designer in Canada?

acceptedAnswer.text: Based on current job listings from top tech companies, remote UX designers in Canada can expect to earn between $150,000 and $250,000 CAD depending on seniority (Senior, Staff, or Principal) and the hiring company (especially well-funded US-based tech companies hiring remotely in Canada).

mainEntity.name: Do US tech companies hire Canadian remote workers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, many major US tech companies (such as Stripe, Reddit, Dropbox, and Coinbase) actively hire remote workers in Canada. They often adjust salaries to the local Canadian market, though compensation remains highly competitive.

mainEntity.name: What are the most common requirements for senior remote UX roles?

acceptedAnswer.text: Senior roles typically require 5-10+ years of experience, a strong portfolio demonstrating systemic thinking and end-to-end product delivery, and often specific domain expertise (such as fintech, B2B SaaS, or developer tools). Deep experience with Figma and cross-functional collaboration is mandatory.
